# QuickToolbox

> 25 free, privacy-first online tools running entirely in your browser. No signup. No tracking. Instant results.

## About

QuickToolbox is a free web application providing 25+ developer and productivity tools. All tools run client-side in the browser with zero server-side processing for maximum privacy and speed.

## Tools

### Web Tools
- [URL Shortener](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/url-shortener): Shorten long URLs into clean, shareable links
- [QR Code Generator](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/qr-code): Generate scannable QR codes from text or URLs
- [IP Info Lookup](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/ip-info): Look up geolocation and ISP info for any IP

### Text & Writing
- [Case Converter](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/case-converter): Transform text between cases (upper, lower, title, camel, snake)
- [Word Counter](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences, and estimate reading time
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/lorem-ipsum): Generate placeholder text for designs
- [Text to Slug](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/text-slug): Convert text into URL-friendly slugs
- [Base64 Encode/Decode](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/base64): Encode or decode Base64 text
- [Markdown Preview](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/markdown-preview): Write Markdown with live HTML preview

### Developer
- [JSON Formatter](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/json-formatter): Beautify, minify, and validate JSON
- [UUID Generator](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/uuid-generator): Generate random UUID v4 identifiers
- [Timestamp Converter](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/timestamp-converter): Convert Unix timestamps to dates
- [Hash Generator](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/hash-generator): Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes
- [Regex Tester](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with match highlighting

### Security
- [Password Generator](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/password-generator): Create strong, secure passwords

### Calculators
- [Percentage Calculator](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/percentage-calculator): Calculate percentages and percentage change
- [Random Number Generator](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/random-number): Generate random numbers in a range
- [Age Calculator](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/age-calculator): Calculate exact age from birthdate
- [BMI Calculator](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/bmi-calculator): Calculate Body Mass Index
- [Unit Converter](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/unit-converter): Convert length, weight, temperature, storage units

### Utilities
- [Color Converter](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/color-converter): Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL
- [Image to Base64](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/image-to-base64): Convert images to Base64 data URLs
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/css-gradient): Build CSS gradients visually
- [Pomodoro Timer](https://kwiktoolbox.com/tools/pomodoro): Stay focused with Pomodoro intervals

## Blog
- [How to Generate QR Codes Free Online](https://kwiktoolbox.com/blog/how-to-generate-qr-code-free-online)
- [Strong Password Generator Guide](https://kwiktoolbox.com/blog/strong-password-generator-guide)
- [URL Shortener: How It Works](https://kwiktoolbox.com/blog/url-shortener-how-it-works)
- [JSON Formatter Online Guide](https://kwiktoolbox.com/blog/json-formatter-online-guide)
- [Markdown Preview Complete Guide](https://kwiktoolbox.com/blog/markdown-preview-online-complete-guide)
- [Regex Tester Beginners Guide](https://kwiktoolbox.com/blog/regex-tester-online-beginners-guide)
